recap:
# Match Recap

Defending champion Argentina mounted a dramatic two-goal comeback against England in the final five minutes, with Enzo Fernández equalizing in the 85th minute and substitute Lautaro Martínez heading in the winner in the 92nd minute to overturn Anthony Gordon's first-half lead. The intense semifinal, played before a raucous Atlanta crowd, sent Argentina to the World Cup final against Spain in East Rutherford on Sunday.
